meaning: v.做姿势表达,用手势谈话,
examples: Normally drivers get out, gesticulate, exchange insurance details and then drive off.
The true life have to gesticulate up vivid many.
Do not gesticulate with a knife or fork when talking.
Neville, 30, was seen to grab his shirt and gesticulate wildly towards Liverpool fans after Ferdinand's late winner.
If you haven't, you really should, because there's nothing quite like seeing a man gesticulate wildly for seemingly no reason.
